description: 30cm Round Plastic Plant Pot, designed for both indoor and outdoor use. Crafted from high-quality, weather-resistant plastic, this lightweight yet durable planter is perfect for housing flowers, herbs, shrubs, and small trees. Its classic terracotta color adds a natural touch to any space, blending beautifully with gardens, patios, balconies, and indoor settings.
